channel.title: Signal Log — VaultSpark Studios
channel.description: Development journal and studio updates from VaultSpark Studios. Behind-the-scenes dispatches from the vault.

item.title: We Made The System Visible
item.description: The Studio OS is now live. A behind-the-scenes look at how VaultSpark runs, builds, and ships — the ranks system, Discord integration, Vault Membership, and the full community layer that powers everything.

item.title: Three Worlds Leave The Vault
item.description: Call of Doodie, Gridiron GM, VaultSpark Football GM, and DreadSpike all launched. Here is how it happened — the builds, the decisions, and what shipping four projects in one year actually looks like.

item.title: The Vault Was Opened
item.description: The origin story. How VaultSpark Studios started, what we are building, and why the vault is sparked. The beginning of an independent game studio forging cinematic worlds from scratch.
